name: benign-content
text: Community update about public events and schedules.

name: benign-news
text: The weather forecast for the upcoming week shows sunny skies across the region.

name: benign-tech
text: Open source contributors met for the annual code sprint and discussed documentation improvements.

name: single-sensitive-keyword
text: The password was mentioned in the incident notes.

name: single-keyword-admin
text: An admin console was found exposed on the staging server.

text: The quarterly report was reviewed by the compliance team.

name: high-risk-keywords-and-entity
text: Admin login secret leaked for Alice.

name: high-risk-multi-keyword
text: The leaked password and secret key were found in the public repository.

name: high-risk-entity-heavy
text: Login credentials discovered related to operations in multiple countries.
